---
title: "Final"
format: html
---

## Clean Data

```{r}
#install.packages("bayesrules")
library(bayesrules)
data("moma")
```

```{r}
#Clean the Data
library(tidyverse)
moma_clean <- moma %>%
  drop_na()

```

```{r}
#install.packages("countrycode")  # run once
library(countrycode)
```

```{r}
moma_clean <- moma_clean %>%
  mutate(region = case_when(
    
    # 🌎 North America
    country %in% c("american", "canadian", "canadian inuit", "mexican", "costa rican",
                   "cuban", "guatemalan", "haitian", "nicaraguan", "salvadoran",
                   "panamanian", "bahamian", "brazilian", "brazilian", "bahamian") ~ "North America",
    
    # 🌎 South America
    country %in% c("argentine", "bolivian", "chilean", "colombian", "ecuadorian",
                   "guyanese", "paraguayan", "peruvian", "uruguayan", "venezuelan") ~ "South America",
    
    # 🌍 Europe
    country %in% c("albanian", "austrian", "belgian", "bosnian", "british",
                   "bulgarian", "croatian", "czech", "czechoslovakian", "danish",
                   "dutch", "estonian", "finnish", "french", "german", "greek",
                   "hungarian", "icelandic", "irish", "italian", "latvian",
                   "lithuanian", "luxembourgish", "macedonian", "norwegian",
                   "polish", "portuguese", "romanian", "russian", "scottish",
                   "serbian", "slovak", "slovenian", "spanish", "swedish",
                   "swiss", "ukrainian", "yugoslav") ~ "Europe",
    
    # 🌏 Asia
    country %in% c("afghan", "bangladeshi", "cambodian", "chinese", "emirati",
                   "filipino", "georgian", "indian", "iranian", "israeli",
                   "japanese", "kazakh", "kuwaiti", "lebanese", "malaysian",
                   "pakistani", "palestinian", "singaporean", "south korean",
                   "korean", "taiwanese", "thai", "turkish") ~ "Asia",
    
    # 🌍 Africa
    country %in% c("algerian", "beninese", "burkinabe", "cameroonian",
                   "congolese", "egyptian", "ethiopian", "ghanaian",
                   "ivorian", "kenyan", "libyan", "malian", "moroccan",
                   "namibian", "nigerian", "rwandan", "senegalese",
                   "sierra leonean", "south african", "sudanese",
                   "tanzanian", "tunisian", "ugandan", "zimbabwean") ~ "Africa",
    
    # 🌏 Oceania
    country %in% c("australian", "new zealander") ~ "Oceania",
    
    # ❓ Missing / unknown
    country %in% c("nationality unknown", "", NA, "unknown") ~ NA_character_,
    
    # fallback
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))
```

```{r}
moma_clean <- moma_clean %>%
  mutate(
    gender = factor(gender),
    alive = factor(alive),   
    region = factor(region),
    department = factor(department),

  )
```

```{r}
mean(moma_clean$count)
var(moma_clean$count)
```

# How does an artist’s living status (alive vs. deceased) relate to the number of works held in MoMA’s collection, after adjusting for gender, geographic origin, generation, and department?

### Q1: Does being dead or alive affect the timing of the first acquisition by MoMa?
